title: galium schelkownikowianum
intro: Galium schelkownikowianum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is also known as Schelkownikow's bedstraw. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Galium schelkownikowianum has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, and can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for herbal use.
